# RANKING MATTERS - LOCAL SEO AGENCY

## SUMMARY
Ranking Matters is a performance-driven Local SEO agency helping local businesses claim #1 spot on Google Maps.

## CORE SERVICES
- Google Business Profile Optimization
- GMB Suspension & Recovery  
- Local Citation Engineering
- Google Maps Ranking & Marketing
- Landing Page Design

## PRICING
- Local Spark: ₨ 50,000/mo
- Map Dominator: ₨ 70,000/mo
- Enterprise: ₨ 90,000/mo
